fields.name: Amandeep Singh
fields.title: CSE Student | Data Science & ML Enthusiast
fields.bio: A Computer Science Engineering student at Lovely Professional University with a passion for data science, machine learning, and building meaningful data-driven solutions. I enjoy turning raw data into actionable insights through analytical thinking and clean code.
fields.career_goal: Aspiring Data Scientist and ML Engineer looking to leverage Python, machine learning, and data visualization to solve real-world problems and drive impactful decisions.

fields.title: Bank Customer Churn Prediction
fields.description: Developed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline to analyze and predict bank customer churn behavior. Applied class imbalance handling techniques and performed detailed model evaluation to improve recall. Implemented and optimized an XGBoost model to improve customer retention outcomes.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Imbalanced-Learn, Matplotlib

fields.title: Air Pollution Analytics & Visualization Dashboard
fields.description: Analyzed nationwide air quality datasets to identify pollution patterns and derive AQI-based actionable insights. Structured dimensional data models using Power Query and DAX to enable scalable pollution analysis. Visualized pollution levels and AQI categories through an interactive Power BI dashboard with dynamic filters.
fields.tech_stack: Microsoft Power BI, Power Query, DAX

fields.title: Trending Movies Data Analysis & Popularity Prediction
fields.description: Analyzed movie metadata and audience metrics to understand trends and predict popularity. Performed data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, and dashboard creation using Python and Power BI. Delivered an interactive analytics dashboard and classification model to identify high and low popularity movies.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Pandas, MySQL, Microsoft Power BI, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-learn

fields.title: SQLytics Sales Dashboard
fields.description: Centered on analyzing Superstore sales data to uncover business trends and performance insights. Handled data cleaning, SQL querying, and interactive dashboard development using Excel and Power Pivot. Provided clear sales performance insights and KPI visibility through a dynamic, SQL-driven dashboard.

fields.degree: Bachelor of Technology – Computer Science and Engineering
fields.relevant_courses: Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, DBMS, Computer Networks, Machine Learning

fields.name: Decoding Data Science with Excel and Tableau

fields.title: Filed an Intellectual Property Rights patent for a kinetic energy harvesting wireless earbud system.
Earned a 4-star rating in SQL and a 3-star rating in Python on HackerRank.
